payload.title: Set up PolicyPoint Sales Skills QA scorecard
payload.description:
Create the new PolicyPoint Sales Skills QA scorecard from the SalesFloor SOW workbook.

Scope:
- Extract scorecard metadata and populated score rubrics from `/Users/ryan/Downloads/SalesFloor_Sales Skills SOW_v2.xlsx`.
- Create the scorecard and score records in Plexus.
- Transform each rubric into Plexus classifier guidelines.
- Validate every generated guidelines document before publishing it to score versions.

Definition of Done:
- Scorecard record exists and is verified.
- All populated workbook items have score records.
- Each score has valid guidelines created from the workbook rubric.
- Final setup is verified with Plexus read APIs.
